title: micromeria bracteolata
intro: Micromeria bracteolata, also known as the Rock Tea or Mountain Tea, is a species of flowering plant in the mint family (Lamiaceae), native to the Mediterranean region. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its antioxidant and anti-inflammatory effects, which may help to reduce the risk of certain diseases such as cancer and cardiovascular disease. The plant has been used to treat various health conditions, including digestive issues, respiratory problems, and stress relief, due to its calming and soothing effects. Herbal preparations of Micromeria bracteolata can be found in teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often consumed to reap its health benefits.
